---
title: "Research Analysis Notebook"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("utils","check_packages.R"))
source(here("utils","functions.R"))
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data

load(here("data", "data_constructed", "analytical_data.RData"))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig-intermar-endogamy-compare
#| fig-cap: Relationship between endogamy parameter and resulting log odds ratio of intergroup marriage

ggplot(intermar, aes(x = endogamy, y = lor, 
                     group = group_share, color = group_share))+
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5)+
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, alpha = 0.5)+
  theme_bw()
```
